bean_corn_ratio.name: Soybean / Corn Ratio
bean_corn_ratio.desc: Soybean ÷ Corn price. Drives US acreage. >2.4 favors bean planting.

kc_cbot_spread.name: KC – CBOT Wheat
kc_cbot_spread.desc: HRW premium over SRW. Widens on protein scarcity / HRW crop stress.

wheat_corn_spread.name: Wheat – Corn
wheat_corn_spread.desc: SRW wheat minus corn. Feed substitution. Wide = wheat expensive.

kc_corn_spread.name: KC Wheat – Corn
kc_corn_spread.desc: HRW wheat minus corn. Protein premium over feed corn. Widens on Plains drought.

canola_bean_usd.name: Canola / Soybeans (USD adj)
canola_bean_usd.desc: ICE Canola (USD/MT) ÷ CBOT Beans (USD/MT). True cross-border crush economics.

soy_crush.name: CBOT Board Crush
soy_crush.desc: (Meal×2.2 + Oil×11) – Beans. Processor margin per bushel.

oil_share.name: Oil Share of Crush
oil_share.desc: Soy oil value as % of total crush products. RD demand pushed historic highs.

soyoil_heat.name: Soy Oil / Heating Oil
soyoil_heat.desc: Soy oil (¢/lb) ÷ Heating oil (¢/gal). Biofuel vs fossil parity.
